name: ai
notes: GCC (Moderate) variant of the Integrated AI Governance lab.
Feature availability verified against MS Learn GCC service descriptions (April 2025 Purview-for-Copilot wave + DSPM for AI GCC GA).
Real GCC gaps (not yet itemized in MS Learn GCC tables): Browser Data Security inline block, Network Data Security SASE/SSE integration, Sentinel data lake tier, Sentinel in Defender portal.
Copilot prompt SIT DLP remains preview even on commercial — expect GCC rollout lag.
Graph assignSensitivityLabel is unavailable in US Gov L4/L5 per MS Learn; on GCC Moderate it may succeed.

sensitivityLabels.note: Same unified AI taxonomy. Purview-for-Copilot GA in GCC April 2025.

dlp.note: Copilot label-based DLP (Apr 2025 wave) works; Copilot prompt SIT and Browser/Network Data Security may lag. Endpoint DLP is GA in GCC.

retention.note: AI-Applications locations (MicrosoftCopilotExperiences, EnterpriseAIApps, OtherAIApps) part of Purview-for-Copilot Apr 2025 GCC wave.

eDiscovery.note: GA in GCC (April 2025 wave added Copilot interaction coverage).

communicationCompliance.note: GA in GCC with most classifiers and templates.

insiderRisk.note: Risky AI Usage template is available in GCC.

auditConfig.note: CopilotInteraction audit GA in GCC per April 2025 wave.

sentinelIntegration.note: Azure Government Sentinel workspace + 3 connectors + 7 analytics rules + 2 workbooks + IRM auto-triage playbook. Defender portal Sentinel rollout separate; data lake tier pending in GCC.

testData.note: Graph assignSensitivityLabel: L4/L5 unavailable per MS Learn; GCC Moderate may succeed. Module falls back gracefully.
